creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #3)

I can't tell when, but it seems that the bug was fixed some time between 2023-01-27 and 2023-03-28. 

Compare the list of resources in these two captures: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20230127152444/https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/book/>

<https://web.archive.org/web/20230328061859/https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/book/>

In the earlier capture, there was the actual result that was described in comment 0.
